requests.title: Hackathon Participation at IIT Bombay
requests.reason: I have been selected to represent our college at the National Hackathon conducted by IIT Bombay on May 15-16. I kindly request permission to attend.

requests.title: Medical Leave - 3 Days
requests.reason: I am suffering from viral fever and doctor has advised rest for 3 days. Attaching medical certificate for reference.

requests.title: Inter-College Cultural Fest
requests.reason: Our college has been invited to participate in Spectrum 2026 cultural fest at St. Xavier's College. I am part of the dance team representing our college.

requests.title: Industrial Visit Permission
requests.reason: Requesting permission to attend the industrial visit to ISRO Space Centre organized by the ECE department on May 20, 2026.

requests.title: Sports Tournament - Cricket
requests.reason: I have been selected for the inter-college cricket tournament. The matches are scheduled from May 18-22. Requesting 5 days permission.

announcements.title: Mid-Semester Examinations Schedule Released
announcements.content: The Mid-Semester examination schedule for all departments has been released. Exams will be held from May 20 to May 28, 2026. Students are advised to check the timetable on the notice board and prepare accordingly. No proxies will be allowed during exam days.
announcements.author: Dr. Vikram Singh

announcements.title: CodeFest 2026 - Registration Now Open!
announcements.content: The annual CodeFest 2026 is here! Register your team of 2-4 members and compete in categories like Web Development, AI/ML, and Competitive Coding. Last date to register: May 17, 2026. Contact the CSE department for more details.
announcements.author: Prof. Anjali Verma

announcements.title: Library Timings Extended for Exam Season
announcements.content: To support students during the upcoming examination period, the Central Library will now remain open until 10:00 PM on weekdays (Monday to Friday). Weekend timings remain 9 AM to 6 PM. Make the best use of this facility!
announcements.author: Dr. Vikram Singh

announcements.title: Campus Placement Drive - TCS & Infosys
announcements.content: TCS and Infosys will be conducting on-campus placement drives on May 25-26, 2026. Eligible students (CGPA 6.5 and above, no active backlogs) should register with the Training & Placement cell before May 18. Dress code: Formal.
announcements.author: Dr. Vikram Singh

messages.text: Can someone help me understand the difference between TCP and UDP protocols? I always get confused during exams.
What are the recommended resources for learning Data Structures and Algorithms for placements?
Hey everyone! The CodeFest 2026 team registrations are closing soon. Who wants to form a team for the Web Dev category? I have experience in React and Next.js.
Reminder: All 3rd year students must submit their project proposal by May 15. Please coordinate with your respective project guides.
Does anyone have notes for the Operating Systems unit on Memory Management? I missed a few classes.

facultyRequests.title: Request for Additional Lab Hours
facultyRequests.reason: The 3rd year CSE students require additional lab sessions to complete their DBMS practicals before the semester exam. Requesting 2 extra hours per week for the next 3 weeks.

facultyRequests.title: Seminar Hall Booking - Guest Lecture
facultyRequests.reason: Requesting the seminar hall on May 18, 2026 from 10 AM to 1 PM for a guest lecture by an industry expert from DRDO on Advanced Signal Processing.

facultyRequests.title: Lab Equipment Procurement
facultyRequests.reason: The Mathematics lab requires 10 new scientific calculators and 2 projectors for effective teaching. Requesting approval for procurement from the budget allocated for this academic year.
